observation.summary: ProviderEventDraft mapping was encoded in a Go switch while reader docs only described the boundary.

hypothesis.summary: A manifest can make every EventKind either mapped to an IR EventType or intentionally skipped, and prove the source switch agrees.

execution.summary: Parse provider_event_draft.go, compare mapped and skipped EventKind rows, and upload mapping evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects source mapping drift, EventKind coverage gaps, EventKind const mismatches, and generated doc drift.

retrospective.summary: Provider draft mapping reader docs are generated, while the switch remains runtime source evidence.

evidence.proves: provider draft mapping manifest matches source switch and EventKind coverage
public CI uploads provider draft mapping evidence
